birthPlace.address: Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Italy

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Otto-William (French: Otte-Guillaume; German: Otto Wilhelm; 955-21 September 1026 AD), was Count of Mâcon, Count of Nevers, and the Count of Burgundy.

«b»Life«/b»
Otto-William of Mâcon was born in 958 during the joint reign of his grandfather, King Berengar II of Italy, and his father, King Adalbert. His mother was Gerberga of Mâcon. His mother gave him what would later be the Free County of Burgundy around Dole in 982. Otto also inherited the duchy of Burgundy on the other side of the Saône in 1002 from his stepfather Eudes Henry the Great. The duchy then corresponded to the diocese of Besançon in the Holy Roman Empire. By 990 Otto-William was the Count of Nevers. He was also Count of Mâcon in France.

While the son of a king, he did not himself seek a royal wife. In 975-680, he married Ermentrude of Roucy, whose maternal grandmother, Gerberga of Saxony, was a sister of Otto I, Holy Roman Emperor, and by this marriage alliance created a web of consanguinity between later kings of France, Germany, Burgundy and the Carolingians. Even his children's spouses, although from great families, came from widespread and scattered parts of France.

The Duchy of Burgundy was annexed to the crown of France by King Robert II in 1004. Determined to be sovereign ruler of his own lands, Otto revolted against the Emperor Henry II in 1016. This was after Rudolph III of Burgundy, the last king of Arles, had done homage to Henry at Strasbourg, making him his guard and heir. On Otto's death, the Free County fell under the suzerainty of the German emperors. Otto-William died on 21 September 1026 at the age of 64.

«b»Marriage and issue«/b»
His first wife was Ermentrude, daughter of Renaud of Roucy. They had two sons and three daughters:

1.) Guy (975-1006) had been associated as count of Mâcon from 995. He married Aelis.

2.) Matilda, married Landri of Nevers, Count of Nevers

3.) Gerberga, married Guilhem II of Provence.

4.) Renaud I, Count of Burgundy (c.?990-1057), he married Adelaide (Alice) of Normandy.

5.) Agnes, married firstly William V of Aquitaine, secondly Geoffrey II of Anjou.

Otto remarried late in life to a wife named Adelaide. Some scholars have identified her with the four-times widowed Adelaide-Blanche of Anjou, but the identity is not directly attested and has been disputed by some studying the question.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon於0958年出生在義大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞馬薩 馬爾塔納皮蒙特時，他的父親Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia23歲，母親Gerberga de Chalon18歲。他於大約0983年與Ermentrude de Roucy在義大利皮蒙特托利諾奧利奧 卡納福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1026年9月21日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔享年68歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon于0958年出生在意大利武恩布利亞培盧吉亞馬薩 馬爾塔納皮蒙特时，他的父亲Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia23岁，母亲Gerberga de Chalon18岁。他于大约0983年与Ermentrude de Roucy在意大利皮蒙特托利諾奧利奧 卡納福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1026年9月21日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易姆a孔享年68岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬。

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

en.lifeSummary: When Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon was born in 0958, in Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Italy, his father, Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia, was 23 and his mother, Gerberga de Chalon, was 18. He married Ermentrude de Roucy about 0983, in Orio Canavese, Turin, Piedmont, Italy. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 21 September 1026, in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon est né en 0958, à Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Italie, son père, Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Gerberga de Chalon, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Ermentrude de Roucy environ 0983, à Orio Canavese, Torino, Piemonte, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 21 septembre 1026, à Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon 0958 in Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia 23 und seine Mutter Gerberga de Chalon 18. Er hat um 0983 in Orio Canavese, Torino, Piemonte, Italien Ermentrude de Roucy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 21. September 1026 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Ermentrude de Roucy circa 0983, nel Orio Canavese, Torino, Piemonte, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1026, nel Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ko.Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria: 이탈리아 브리아 페루지아 마사 마탠아 피몽
ko.lifeSummary: Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon(이)가 0958년 이탈리아 브리아 페루지아 마사 마탠아 피몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Gerberga de Chalon(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 0983년 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 오리오 캔아베스에서 Ermentrude de Roucy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1026년 9월 21일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 a콘에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon nasceu em 0958, em Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Itália, seu pai, Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Gerberga de Chalon, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermentrude de Roucy aproximadamente 0983, em Orio Canavese, Torino, Piemonte, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1026, em Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria: пиемонт, масса мартана, пиругя, умбря, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon родился в 0958 г. в местности пиемонт, масса мартана, пиругя, умбря, Италия, его отцу по имени Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Gerberga de Chalon, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermentrude de Roucy около 0983 г. в местности орио канавес, торино, пиемонт, Италия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 21 сентября 1026 г. в местности мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otte-Guillaume Ier d'Ivrée comte de Bourgogne et de Mâcon nació en 0958, en Piemonte, Massa Martana, Perugia, Umbria, Italia, su papá, Adalberto II d'Ivrea Re d'Italia, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Gerberga de Chalon, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Ermentrude de Roucy aproximadamente 0983, en Orio Canavese, Torino, Piemonte, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1026, en Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
